port_metadata.provider: Compañía Marítima del Pacífico, S.A. de C.V.

geographic_scope_and_terminals.limits: Jurisdictional waters of the Port of Mazatlán
terminals: All terminals within the jurisdictional waters and the National Port System Administration (ASIPONA) Mazatlán area

billing_logic_definitions.service_description: Includes towage assistance for Arrivals (Entradas), Departures (Salidas), and Anchoring (Fondeo).
billing_logic_definitions.billing_basis: Rate per H.P. / Hour for each tug employed.

time_measurement.movement_time_definition: Legally defined as 20 minutes before the time indicated in the service request
time_measurement.start_trigger: Starts when lines are exchanged or the tug is ready at the agreed location
time_measurement.end_trigger: Ends when lines are cast off or as indicated by the pilot

duration_logic.minimum_charge: Amount equivalent to one hour of service
duration_logic.rounding: Any fraction of 15 minutes is charged as a full 15-minute period
duration_logic.overtime_surcharge_basis: 25% of the basic quota per 15-minute increment

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Bow Thruster Discount
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.vessel_equipment_specific: Vessels with an operational Bow Thruster
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Vessel effectively uses only one tug during maneuvers
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.note: If two or more tugs are used, the full tariff applies without discount

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Small Vessel Discount
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Service requested for vessels in this size bracket
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.logic: The applicable charge is 70% of the total maneuver amount

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Mechanical Deficiency / Failure
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.vessel_condition_specific: Vessels with machine or steering deficiencies
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Deficiencies or failures present during arrival or departure service

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Late Cancellation
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Notice given < 1 hour before tug movement (Requested Time - 20 mins)

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Cancellation After Movement
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: User desists from service once tugs have started moving

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Waiting / Standby Time
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Tugs must wait due to causes imputable to the user
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.basis: Per hour or fraction of wait time, starting from the time indicated in request

vessel_specific_exclusions.note: Excluded from this tariff; billed under separate office DGP.-1285/2025 (April 4, 2024)
Salvage, firefighting, and special services are subject to negotiation based on international maritime customs

administrative_subtext.notice_period: Service must be requested in writing at least 3 hours in advance during business hours
administrative_subtext.payment_requirement: Users must cover the estimated service amount at the time of request; final adjustment made upon invoice
administrative_subtext.resolution_authority: General Directorate of Ports of the Secretariat of the Navy (SEMAR)
